item.title: Right to own WHAT property?
item.description:
Right to own WHAT property? Police defending WHOSE rights? Prisons for WHO? This country we founded on all of those things literally maintaining slavery, so damn right we want to get rid of them



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: DOES NOT APPLY TO JEWISH PPL
item.description:
DOES NOT APPLY TO JEWISH PPL. To be clear. Hey guys, if you haven’t read something in its original language or even vaguely understand the context, stop telling me about it. This by the way is just a trend amongst antisemites, that’s why I pointed out much more than anything else



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: We can and should have a tactical engagement with any and all ideologies, but if you are uncomfortable with tactically engaging ...
item.description:
We can and should have a tactical engagement with any and all ideologies, but if you are uncomfortable with tactically engaging with fascists when they agree with you on a policy, you should feel the exact same way about all of the people named here



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Yes, it is not just your identity as a queer Israeli that is pink washing but it is the use of that identity to justify not only...
item.description:
Yes, it is not just your identity as a queer Israeli that is pink washing but it is the use of that identity to justify not only the existence of Israel, but the ongoing colonialism that that necessitates#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I will stress once again, every single person named here is an atrocity and reprehensible , and the point is to understand those...
item.description:
I will stress once again, every single person named here is an atrocity and reprehensible , and the point is to understand those atrocities so we can prevent them



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
